channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Enugu State dismisses claims of fatal fire at Ugwu Onyeama section of Enugu–Onitsha Expressway
item.description: Enugu State Ministry of Transport don clear air on social media say the report wey dey circulate about a big fire wey allegedly kill over 50 people for Ugwu Onyeama, Enugu–Onitsha Expressway, na total...

item.title: Senqu Bridge Strengthens Connectivity and Water Cooperation Between Lesotho and South Africa
item.description: The recently inaugurated Senqu Bridge in Mokhotlong, Lesotho, marks a major milestone in Phase II of the Lesotho Highlands Water Project (LHWP). Cabinet highlighted that the bridge will guarantee cont...

item.title: Saftu calls for presidential clarity over allegations against Minister Tolashe
item.description: The South African Federation of Trade Unions (Saftu) has raised serious concerns over Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe, who faces allegations involving undeclared luxury SUVs from Chinese of...

item.title: Arinola Ogbara-Banjoko joins Nigeria Commodity Exchange board to represent Lagos State
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don appoint Mrs Arinola Ogbara-Banjoko as Non-Executive Director wey go represent Lagos State for the board of Nigeria Commodity Exchange (NGX), under the Federal Ministry of Ind...

item.title: Suspected Armed Robber Killed During Failed Highway Carjacking Near Mtito Andei
item.description: In a tense incident along the Mombasa-Kampala highway near Mtito Andei, a suspected armed robber was killed after a failed attempt to hijack a transit vehicle. The Directorate of Criminal Investigatio...

item.title: COC Filing for First BARMM Parliamentary Elections Proceeds Without Incidents
item.description: Naging maayos at walang naitalang aberya ang tatlong araw na paghahain ng certificates of candidacy (COCs) para sa kauna-unahang parliamentary elections sa Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Minda...

item.title: Lagos to Introduce Paid Parking on Selected Streets to Reduce Traffic Congestion
item.description: The Lagos State Government don yan say dem dey plan to start charging motorists for parking on certain streets across the state. The plan go start as pilot for Ikeja first before e go spread to other ...

item.title: US Conducts Retaliatory Strikes on Iranian Vessels Following Attacks on American Warships
item.description: The United States launched a series of military strikes against Iranian assets after three US Navy destroyers came under attack by multiple missiles, drones, and small boats. According to US Central C...

item.title: Post-May 2025 India-Pakistan Conflict Spurs Technological and Strategic Military Shifts
item.description: One year after the four-day conflict between India and Pakistan in May 2025, military analysts in both countries view the confrontation as a turning point rather than a routine skirmish. The war highl...

item.title: Kaspersky Study Finds Majority of MD5 Password Hashes Vulnerable to Fast Cracking
item.description: In a recent analysis released for World Password Day, Kaspersky researchers found that 60% of MD5-hashed passwords could be cracked in under an hour using a high-end Nvidia RTX 5090 GPU, while 48% cou...

item.title: Former Calcutta High Court Chief Justice TS Sivagnanam Steps Down From SIR Appellate Tribunal Citing Personal Reasons
item.description: Former Chief Justice of the Calcutta High Court, TS Sivagnanam, has resigned from the SIR Appellate Tribunal in West Bengal, which was handling appeals by voters whose names were deleted from the elec...

item.title: Inside Charlene Ruto’s Work in Business, Agriculture, and Youth Empowerment
item.description: Charlene Ruto, daughter of President William Ruto, is increasingly becoming a notable public figure in Kenya, especially among the youth. At 33 years old and a graduate of Daystar University, she is i...

item.title: Tyla clarifies brief interactions with Rihanna at consecutive Met Gala events
item.description: South African singer Tyla has addressed online speculation about her interactions with global superstar Rihanna following recent Met Gala appearances. In a video shared on social media, Tyla explained...

item.title: Geely acquires stake in Ford’s Valencia plant amid broader Chinese expansion into European manufacturing
item.description: Chinese automotive giant Geely has reportedly acquired a portion of Ford’s manufacturing facility in Almussafes, Valencia, as part of its strategy to strengthen its footprint in Europe. According to S...

item.title: IMF Highlights Potential Risks of AI on Global Finance
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has raised concerns regarding the growing influence of artificial intelligence (AI) on the global financial system. According to the IMF, AI-driven technologies, ...

item.title: NFL Expands Streaming Strategy with Netflix Australia Game While Facing Regulatory Scrutiny
item.description: The NFL continues to expand its presence on streaming platforms, with Netflix poised to broadcast a historic regular-season game in Australia between the San Francisco 49ers and Los Angeles Rams on Se...

item.title: Shettima Submits Tinubu’s Nomination Forms with APC Governors’ Support
item.description: On Thursday, Vice-President Kashim Shettima waka go submit President Bola Tinubu’s nomination and expression of interest forms to APC national officers for 2027 election. The submission happen for Bol...

item.title: The Advocates for Human Rights Publishes 2025 Scorecard Highlighting Global Champions in Death Penalty Abolition
item.description: On March 9, 2026, during a side event at the Human Rights Council in Geneva, The Advocates for Human Rights unveiled a new scorecard titled “Champions of Death Penalty Abolition” for 2025. The tool ce...

item.title: Mumbai Court Grants Bail to Concert Organiser Amid Ongoing Drug Overdose Investigation
item.description: A Mumbai court on Thursday granted bail to Akash Samal, one of the organisers of a techno music concert at NESCO Exhibition Centre in Goregaon, following the tragic deaths of two MBA students due to d...

item.title: CMHC introduces new measures to track early trends in Canadian homebuilding
item.description: Canada Mortgage and Housing Corp. (CMHC) is updating its housing statistics to better capture shifts in the homebuilding market. The agency will include residential building permit data in its monthly...
